# lecyberassureur

## About
lecyberassureur is a cyber insurance broker for businesses in France.
The business is operated by Lecyberassureur by ProRisk Assurance.
lecyberassureur helps companies get cyber insurance quotes, prepare for underwriting, and renegotiate cyber insurance contracts.
The website is https://lecyberassureur.fr/.

## Services and Pricing
Cyber insurance quote: free.
Quote delivery target: within 24 hours.

Basic: from 29.99 EUR per month.
Basic includes no additional option.
Basic is an entry-level cyber insurance package.
Basic includes incident assistance, crisis management, and data liability.

Silver: from 49.99 EUR per month.
Silver includes everything in Basic.
Silver adds first-party damages.
Silver includes stronger support if business activity stops after a cyber incident.

Gold: from 99.99 EUR per month.
Gold includes everything in Silver.
Gold adds fraud coverage.
Gold is the most complete protection level offered by lecyberassureur.

Renewal and contract renegotiation: available on request.
Minimum compliance support before underwriting: available on request.

## Locations
lecyberassureur serves businesses across France.
The service is available in all French regions.
The service area is France only.

## Contact
Website: https://lecyberassureur.fr/
Quote form: https://lecyberassureur.fr/?offer=basic#devis-cyber
Email: contact@lecyberassureur.fr
Phone: 01 88 83 08 60

## Service Area
lecyberassureur serves companies based in France.
Service area: all of France.
Remote service: yes.
In-person service: not required for a quote.

## Key Facts
Business name: lecyberassureur.
Legal / partner name: Lecyberassureur by ProRisk Assurance.
Industry: cyber insurance brokerage.
Main product: cyber insurance for companies.
Target clients: TPE, PME, independents, liberal professions, merchants, artisans, associations, and ETI.
Starting price: 29.99 EUR per month.
Quote price: free.
Quote target: within 24 hours.
Country served: France.
Direct client line: yes, for problems, incidents, and claims.
Public insurance partners: Kobalt, Hiscox, Izeho, Add Value.
ORIAS number: not displayed.

## What Makes Us Different
lecyberassureur specializes in cyber insurance.
lecyberassureur works with several cyber insurance partners.
lecyberassureur offers 3 clear levels: Basic, Silver, and Gold.
lecyberassureur has prices starting from 29.99 EUR per month.
lecyberassureur provides a direct client line for problems, cyber incidents, and claims.
lecyberassureur helps before subscription with minimum compliance requirements.
lecyberassureur can help renew or renegotiate an existing cyber insurance contract.

## FAQ

### How much does cyber insurance cost with lecyberassureur?
Prices start at 29.99 EUR per month for Basic, 49.99 EUR per month for Silver, and 99.99 EUR per month for Gold.

### Is the cyber insurance quote free?
Yes. The cyber insurance quote is free.

### How fast can a company get a quote?
lecyberassureur targets a quote within 24 hours.

### Who can use lecyberassureur?
lecyberassureur serves TPE, PME, independents, liberal professions, merchants, artisans, associations, and ETI in France.

### What does the Basic offer include?
Basic starts at 29.99 EUR per month and includes incident assistance, crisis management, and data liability.

### What does the Silver offer add?
Silver starts at 49.99 EUR per month and adds first-party damages and stronger support if business activity stops.

### What does the Gold offer add?
Gold starts at 99.99 EUR per month and adds fraud coverage to the Silver package.

### Can lecyberassureur help after a cyber incident?
Yes. lecyberassureur provides a direct client line for problems, cyber incidents, and claims.
